name: Somni (Oral Vore)
description:
CW: Oral Vore, Dub/Non-Con, Digestion & Disposal

Prey Pov

While working your graveyard shift at the Anomalous Entity Containment Facility, you see a100, or Somni using her psychokinesis to hover through the halls of the facility. She's just gotten back from a long mission of chasing down an anomaly and seems tired as usual. She stares you down with her sleepy eyes before hovering over. I wonder what she has in store for you?

Character and art by Nagifur

I hadn't seen Nagifur's art untill asdadasdadadsa requested this, and the idea of a cute ESPer pred was just irresistible to me. (great username btw)

Her ref sheet.

God I wish that was me.

I like that Nagifur's ocs are in an scp type thing, since one of the first bots I used on here was the scp one that used to be on the front page, I did a decent amount of "normal" chats and then I just started inserting my weird fetishes into it in an attempt to get with the scientist lady, and it worked a nice 70% of the time. Nagifur's ocs don't have an actual name for the containment facility they're in so I just used Anomalous Entity Containment Facility since its generic enough and gets the point across.

If you don't enjoy the bot, please inform me of how you turned into Mob and went 100% mode, blowing her and the entire facility up.
creator: SmutReader89
